cookieConsent.title: Matomo audience measurement
cookieConsent.text: AmusementPark uses Matomo to understand visitor journeys and improve the website. Audience measurement only starts after your agreement.

privacyPage.title: Privacybeleid
privacyPage.lead: This page explains how AmusementPark processes personal data, Matomo audience measurement and privacy choices.

consent.title: Manage audience measurement
consent.text: Matomo is configured with prior consent on the website. You can accept, refuse or show the banner again at any time.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body1: The data controller is Cédric Caudron, publisher of the AmusementPark website.
controller.body2: For any personal-data request, you can use the contact methods published on cedric-caudron.com.

data.title: Processed data
data.body1: The website may process account data needed for the service: email address, provided first or last name, avatar, preferred language and profile settings.
data.body2: Technical data may also be processed: IP address, date, viewed URL, browser, error logs and security information strictly useful for operation.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.body1: Data is used to provide website features, secure access, manage accounts, display public content and administer the project.
purposes.body2: Processing required for operation relies on service performance or legitimate interest. Matomo audience measurement relies on your consent unless it is later operated in a strict exempt mode.

analytics.title: Matomo audience measurement
analytics.body1: The website uses a self-hosted Matomo instance available at matomo.cedric-caudron.com with site ID 4.
analytics.body2: Matomo may measure visited pages, navigation sequences, traffic sources, device type and technical browser information.
analytics.body3: No third-party advertising tracking is added by this integration. Profile-related journeys may be measured only after consent, without sending private profile content as analytics events.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body1: Strictly necessary cookies or storage may be used for session, security, language, theme and interface preferences.
cookies.body2: The Matomo choice is stored in the browser local storage so the same choice is not requested on every page.

hosting.title: Hosting and processors
hosting.body1: The website is intended to be hosted on a server located in France via Hostinger. Project technical services, including MongoDB, MinIO and Matomo, may run on this VPS.
hosting.body2: Data is not sold to advertisers. It may be processed by technical providers strictly required for hosting, security and operation.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.body1: Accounts are kept while the account exists or while a limited security obligation requires retention.
retention.body2: Technical logs are kept for a period proportionate to security and diagnostics. Matomo data must be configured with a limited period and reviewed regularly.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body1: You can request access, rectification, erasure, restriction or objection for applicable processing of your data.
rights.body2: You can also withdraw analytics consent on this page and, if needed, lodge a complaint with the CNIL.
